subject: refactor(theme): migrate 6 components from custom CSS to Tailwind utilities
body:
Convert ContextMenu, ErrorBoundary, ViewSwitcher, InstallPrompt,
BaseModal, ConfirmDialog, and AnalysisPanel from custom CSS classes
to inline Tailwind utility classes. Delete ~370 lines of CSS rules
from App.css and Toast.css.

Components now use DaisyUI tokens directly via Tailwind classes
(bg-base-200, text-base-content/60, border-base-300, etc.) instead
of custom CSS classes referencing var(--color-*).
